FREE.label: Free

PREMIUM.label: Premium
PREMIUM.description: Everything including editor and unlimited custom cams

UNLIMITED.description: Lifetime access to all current and future features

AI_DIRECTOR.description: Automatic camera switching based on game state

BROADCAST_CAMS.label: Broadcast Cameras
BROADCAST_CAMS.description: Standard, high, and tight broadcast angles

DRONE.label: Drone Camera
DRONE.description: Free-fly drone with lock and orbit modes

BALL_TRACKING.label: Ball Tracking
BALL_TRACKING.description: Enhanced ball velocity and flight detection

EDITOR.label: Camera Editor

CUSTOM_CAMS.label: Custom Cameras
CUSTOM_CAMS.description: Use custom cameras with AI Director

POV.label: POV Camera
POV.description: First-person player view with head bob

BALL_FLIGHT.label: Ball Flight Cam
BALL_FLIGHT.description: Cinematic ball-in-air tracking with arc view

CAMERA_SHAKE.label: Camera Shake
CAMERA_SHAKE.description: Intensity-based camera shake on big plays

SMART_CUTS.label: Smart Cuts
SMART_CUTS.description: AI cuts to catch cam before ball arrives

PREDICTIVE_BALL.label: Predictive Ball
PREDICTIVE_BALL.description: Physics-based ball landing and catch prediction
